title: Genomics Reveals the Origins of Historical Specimens.
author: Cong Q Shen J Zhang J Li W Kinch LN Calhoun JV Warren AD Grishin NV
content: S-EPMC8097301 PMC8097301 Genomics Reveals the Origins of Historical Specimens. Centuries of zoological studies have amassed billions of specimens in collections worldwide. Genomics of these specimens promises to reinvigorate biodiversity research. However, because DNA degrades with age
